title: 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 RX450h Outer Tail Light Bulb Replacement Instructions
description: Replace the outer tail light bulb on 2010–2015 Lexus RX 350 and RX 450h models with steps for accessing and reinstalling the bulb housing.
tips: The cover has an arrow and LH/RH marking — ensure the arrow points up when reinstalling so left and right covers aren't mixed up.
Disconnect the LED brake light connector before removing the bulb housing to avoid ripping the wires.
Turn the bulb housing counterclockwise about 1/8 of a turn to release it, and clockwise to reinstall.
Do not yank the housing — gently manipulate it to avoid damaging the LED brake light wiring.
Hold the bulb carefully after removal so it doesn't fall into the body cavity.
The bulb must be oriented correctly before inserting — align it so it slides in the right direction before turning to lock.
